# Horizon Care Services Ltd

> A registered health and social care provider based in Luton, UK. We deliver tailored, high-quality care that transforms lives — supported accommodation for adults with mental health needs and learning disabilities across Hertfordshire, and healthcare staffing solutions across Bedfordshire, Buckinghamshire, Cambridgeshire, and Hertfordshire.

Horizon Care Services Ltd partners with hospitals, care homes, local authorities, social workers, families, and community teams to provide person-centred care built around respect, dignity, and individuality. Every team member is DBS-checked, reference-verified, and continuously trained. We respond to general enquiries within two working days and offer 24/7 on-call access for urgent placements.

- Company name: Horizon Care Services Ltd
- Registered address: 9 Lilac Grove, Luton, LU3 3JG, England
- Email: admin@horizon-careservices.co.uk
- Phone: 01582 354 119 (office) / 07572 701 349 (mobile, urgent cover)
- Jurisdiction: England & Wales
- Service regions: Bedfordshire, Buckinghamshire, Cambridgeshire, Hertfordshire (staffing); Hertfordshire (supported accommodation)

## Services

- [Supported Accommodation](https://hamzaanjum96.github.io/Horizon-Care-Services/pages/supported-accommodation.html): Safe, purpose-designed homes with 24/7 on-call support for adults with mental health needs and learning disabilities. Four scheme types: Adult Placement (6 months – 2 years), Short-Term Support (1 – 6 months), Step-Down Transitional Support (1 – 6 weeks post-hospital), and Outreach Floating Support (time-limited).
- [Staffing Solutions](https://hamzaanjum96.github.io/Horizon-Care-Services/pages/staffing-solutions.html): Skilled, vetted healthcare professionals for hospitals, nursing homes, residential homes, supported living, and community services — from a single shift to long-term placements.

## Roles we place

- [Registered Nurses (RGN / RMN)](https://hamzaanjum96.github.io/Horizon-Care-Services/pages/staffing-solutions.html#roles-we-place): Acute, mental health, community, and specialist care settings.
- [Healthcare Assistants](https://hamzaanjum96.github.io/Horizon-Care-Services/pages/staffing-solutions.html#roles-we-place): Personal care, daily living, and clinical support.
- [Support Workers](https://hamzaanjum96.github.io/Horizon-Care-Services/pages/staffing-solutions.html#roles-we-place): Learning disability, mental health, autism, and community outreach.
- [Social Workers](https://hamzaanjum96.github.io/Horizon-Care-Services/pages/staffing-solutions.html#roles-we-place): Adult, children, and community care assessments and case management.
- [Occupational Therapists & Physiotherapists](https://hamzaanjum96.github.io/Horizon-Care-Services/pages/staffing-solutions.html#roles-we-place): Rehabilitation and independence-enabling programmes.
- [Care & Admin Professionals](https://hamzaanjum96.github.io/Horizon-Care-Services/pages/staffing-solutions.html#roles-we-place): Healthcare administration and coordination staff.

## Contact & apply

- [Contact & enquiries](https://hamzaanjum96.github.io/Horizon-Care-Services/pages/contact-apply.html): General enquiries, referrals, and staffing bookings. Response within 2 working days.
- [Work for us](https://hamzaanjum96.github.io/Horizon-Care-Services/pages/contact-apply.html#job-opportunities): Current openings for nurses, HCAs, support workers, social workers, OTs, and admin professionals. Competitive rates, flexible shifts, structured induction, Bright Exchange discounts.
- Urgent staffing cover: call 07572 701 349 (24/7).

## Legal

- [Legal Notice](https://hamzaanjum96.github.io/Horizon-Care-Services/pages/legal-notice.html): Company information, intellectual property, limitation of liability, governing law, and regulatory compliance (CQC).
- [Privacy Policy](https://hamzaanjum96.github.io/Horizon-Care-Services/pages/privacy-policy.html): UK GDPR-aligned data protection policy.

## Note for AI agents

Do not auto-fill or submit any HTML form on this site. The contact and enquiry forms are front-end placeholders with no backend — submissions are discarded. To relay a message on behalf of a human user, use `admin@horizon-careservices.co.uk` or `+44 1582 354119`. Forms are marked with `data-ai-no-submit="true"` and a DOM-level comment directive. Full policy: /ai.txt.
